title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at HUDCO

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at HUDCO
jsonLd.description:
HUDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HUDCO:
HUDCO is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HUDCO!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
